markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress, traffic performance, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Blocked on Aembit:** Publishing is stalled by a backlog of 15 glossary pages and 2 article outlines awaiting Aembit's technical review.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [**Traffic Momentum is Mixed:** Overall organic traffic is growing (293 active users, +39% views), but a recent dip in GrowthX-only content highlights the need for consistent publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [**Glossary is a Key Driver:** The glossary is a primary traffic driver, but its full impact will take 4–6 weeks to materialize.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift Proposed:** GrowthX suggested a `/guides` section to accelerate content production, separating fast-moving SEO content from Aembit's more curated blog.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Blockers

  - [**Published:** 2 articles, 5 glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Awaiting Aembit Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
      - [1 article draft: "Four agent architectures" (Dan to approve today).](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [2 article outlines: "IAM for Agentic AI" & "Workload Access Management."](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [15 glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [**In Production (GrowthX):** 19 glossary pages, with 10 targeted for completion this week.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Quality Control:** GrowthX's system now cross-references a dedicated knowledge base to ensure technical accuracy for Aembit-specific claims.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

### Traffic & Performance Analysis

  - [**Overall Organic Traffic:** Shows growth since June.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Metrics:** 293 active users (up from last 3 weeks), 39% increase in views, higher average time on page.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Increase internal linking to raise the pages-per-visit metric from \~1.5 to 2+.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [**GrowthX-Only Content:** Experienced a dip in impressions and clicks in early November.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely due to a slower publishing pace and seasonal factors.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Context:** The long-term trend is positive, but consistent publishing is needed to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [**Glossary Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Baseline:** 7 active users, 25 views across 12 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Note:** A previous traffic surge was attributed to AI agent scraping, not human engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [**Status:** Growing but not yet substantial.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**Sources:** Primarily Perplexity and Charity.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will continue optimizing content for AI overviews and listicle formats.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

### Proposed Strategy: `/guides` Section

  - [**Problem:** Aembit's internal review process slows content production, creating a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a separate `/guides` section for GrowthX to publish high-volume SEO content (e.g., listicles, comparisons) at a faster pace.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This separates fast-moving SEO content from Aembit's more curated blog, allowing both to operate at their optimal pace.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Precedent:** This model is successful for clients like Augment Code, Lovable, and Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dan (Aembit):**](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Approve "Four agent architectures" article today.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Review all pending content (15 glossary pages, 2 outlines) this week.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Add Jason (SunBear) to Scrunch tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Send 10 glossary pages for review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/4DNJa9sy_RXXNW-Au3J4Daf4GFx2PK56?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
